definition:
1. to make fat, fatten , (Euripides); π. χθόνα to fatten  the soil, of a dead man, (Aeschulus Tragicus):—;Pass. to be  or become fat , (Plato Philosophus), etc. 
2. metaphorically, 
3. to increase, enlarge , πλοῦτον (Pindar) 
4. to make wanton, excite , (Aeschulus Tragicus): —;Pass. to wax fat and wanton , (Aeschulus Tragicus); ἔχθεσιν πιαίνεσθαι to batten on  quarrels, (Pindar) (ML)
